queries.question: Can you show both amusement parks in Orlando, Florida and water parks located there?
queries.sql:
SELECT Amusement_Parks.name
FROM Amusement_Parks
WHERE Amusement_Parks.Location = "Orlando, Florida"
UNION
SELECT Water_Parks.name
FROM Water_Parks
WHERE Water_Parks.Location = "Orlando, Florida"

queries.question: Display amusement parks and water parks in Orlando, Florida.
queries.sql:
SELECT Amusement_Parks.name
FROM Amusement_Parks
UNION
SELECT Water_Parks.name
FROM Water_Parks
WHERE Water_Parks.Location = "Orlando, Florida"

ambiguous_dsl.question: Display amusement parks and water parks in Orlando, Florida.
